changes: The parameters for Gloam Boots have been corrected: Accuracy+18 changed to Determination+12.

new_content.name: Marvelously Mutable Materia
new_content.description: A quest to unlock the Materia Transmutation system.

new_content.name: Materia Transmutation
new_content.description: A system that allows players to convert five pieces of unwanted materia into a single new piece.

new_content.name: Binding Coil of Bahamut (Echo)
new_content.description: The strength of the Echo has been increased, granting 15% bonus to max HP, damage dealt, and healing magic potency.

new_content.name: The Whorleater (Extreme)
new_content.description: Tidal Wave Shield and Tidal Wave Buckler have been added as rewards.

new_content.name: A Relic Reborn: The Chimera
new_content.description: Trial unlocked for players who completed the quest 'A Relic Reborn' in Version 1.0.

new_content.name: A Relic Reborn: The Hydra
new_content.description: Trial unlocked for players who completed the quest 'A Relic Reborn' in Version 1.0.

new_content.name: Wolves' Den (PvP)
new_content.description: Maximum PvP rank raised to 40; new gear added and available for purchase.
new_content.npc_location: Storm Private and Storm Sergeant (X:6 Y:5)

housing.name: Cherry Confetti
housing.description: An item used for celebratory animation.
